title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
